chunks.text: Student Award: Kevin K. Gong Memorial Scholarship for Bright Minds and Big Hearts | EECS at UC Berkeley Kevin K. Gong Memorial Scholarship for Bright Minds and Big Hearts The Kevin K. Gong Memorial Scholarship for Bright Minds and Big Hearts pr

al Scholarship for Bright Minds and Big Hearts provides student support to Computer Science or EECS students (rising sophomores - seniors) who are passionate about using technology to better the world. This scholarship was established in 2015. Award
